ops.body: Fixed by the quality-restoration waves (W1 a6b5efaa, W2 699098d8) and proven two ways. ENGINE: test_all_economy_board_regression pins the criterion exactly — 7 same-program economy journeys + one all-business, preferences.cabin {business, primary} only (no judgment crutch): without assess.json the business journey boards via the deterministic notable trigger; with assess verdicts it boards as first finalist. Mechanics: primary-clears guard in _dominates (deterministic set-difference over preference_misses), declared priority folded into factor tiers (registry < declared < judgment override), per-code participation, deterministic per-code trigger. LIVE (2026-07-14 capstone, 425-unit authorized expansion, 220 journeys): the quota-stopped partial contained ZERO all-business round trips (27 J segments all outbound; every return Y/W), so the criterion's "when such journeys exist" guard was false — and the mechanism surfaced the best available business journey (J/J/J outbound to CPH + Y return, 119k) as a notable stretch with the designed why: "clears your business cabin preference — every finalist misses it". Honest assess then lifted warm-beachy Tahiti to #1–2 over cheapest non-beachy Dublin/Paris. Board re-captured as rank's own output (5a71ebdc).
